name: us-atlas
when_to_use: 需要美国州/县边界 choropleth 或全国轮廓时用它而非手写坐标,因为原生在真实 Census 几何、FIPS 标识和共享拓扑边界上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到可信的美国州县边界:坐标不可编造、县级 FIPS 与名称无法徒手配齐,共享弧段也不能靠生成文本保持一致;本包提供 Census 2017 边界的稳定 TopoJSON 地基。

data_in.note: 主结构词按 picks 取 geometry;fetch_url 的 counties-10m.json 是未投影、量化并简化的 TopoJSON,objects 精确含 counties、states、nation。县 id 是五位 FIPS,州 id 是两位 FIPS,properties.name 为名称。

nation.geometries: 单个 id='US' 的 Polygon | MultiPolygon

schema.bbox?: [number, number, number, number] —— 默认缺省

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need US state/county boundaries for a choropleth or a national outline instead of hand-writing coordinates, which tends to fail at real Census geometry, FIPS identifiers, and shared topological boundaries.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot produce trustworthy US state and county boundaries: coordinates cannot be invented, county FIPS codes cannot be paired with names by hand, and shared arcs cannot remain consistent in generated text. This package supplies a stable TopoJSON foundation from Census 2017 boundaries.

data_in.note: The primary structure uses picks to select geometry. fetch_url's counties-10m.json is unprojected, quantized, simplified TopoJSON whose objects are exactly counties, states, and nation. County id is a five-digit FIPS, state id is a two-digit FIPS, and properties.name contains the name.

schema.bbox?: [number, number, number, number] -- omitted by default

artifact_note: artifact 发布前应 fetch 此 pinned URL 并把 JSON 内联为常量;只有宿主明确白名单 cdn.jsdelivr.net 时才保留运行时 fetch。只需州界可换同版 states-10m.json;要免投影的 975×610 SVG/Canvas 坐标可换 counties-albers-10m.json,不要再套 d3 地理投影。

isolation.evidence: Static TopoJSON data-asset (counties-10m.json / states-10m.json / nation-10m.json + albers variants) — no runtime code, no exports, no DOM. Rendering is done entirely by the consumer's own d3-geo/topojson code, so it is inert with respect to shadow isolation.
